bannerBody: We use cookies that are necessary for the website to function. With your consent, we enable Google Analytics and Google Maps.
modalBody: Select which categories to allow. Essential cookies are always enabled.
necessaryDesc: These cookies save your cookie preferences and ensure the basic functionality of the website.
analyticsDesc: Google Analytics 4 — anonymous statistics on website visits and user behavior.
functionalDesc: Google Maps — an interactive map showing the locations of the vacation homes.
